trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h price retest and bounce from EMA20 ($73,690) with Taker Buy Ratio > 51%
trade_plans.invalidation: Hourly close below $72,800 or funding rate spikes above 0.03% (overheated longs)
confluence_signals: Price-volume divergence showing weak selling on dips
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Combination of extreme contrarian sentiment (L/S ratio) and healthy trend characteristics (OI/Price alignment) offsets the bearish smart money flow and overbought RSI.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price consolidation above EMA20 ($2,325) while L/S ratio remains below 1.0
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (0th percentile L/S ratio)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Highest relative strength combined with an absolute record-low L/S ratio suggests a major short squeeze is in progress; the trend has high momentum backing.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Binance price spread vs OKX/Bybit narrows (arbitrage buy pressure)
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (0th percentile L/S ratio)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Arbitrage pressure from the Binance discount combined with technical support at EMA clusters provides a high-floor entry for a squeeze play.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Funding velocity acceleration continues positive while price holds above EMA20 ($85.07)
trade_plans.invalidation: Hourly close below $83.00 (ATR expected range low)
confluence_signals: Price-volume divergence (weak selling on the 1h dip)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: The positive acceleration in funding velocity despite a minor price dip indicates shorts are paying a premium to stay in, increasing the probability of a violent squeeze.

results.cross_asset_insight: The ETH/BTC ratio is rising alongside extreme fear (12), signaling a 'disbelief' rally where alts lead. Despite bearish smart money flows, the record-low retail long/short ratios across all symbols suggest the path of least resistance is higher via short liquidations.
